title: Lyan's HeroPack
description: This modpack alows you to play whit the mods and texturepacks i use fore my YT series
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zI05htHtfA8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Powers form Arrzee superhero mod

Speedforce (Speedburst - Based on "The Flash") Adjustible Speed, Speed Leveling Aerokinesis (Tornado Arms) Wall Running Speed Punches Phasing Toggle Shield (Requires Suit) Enter Speedforce (DISABLED)

Electricity Conduction (Current - Based on "Electro") Lightning Bolt Lightning Beam Toggle Shield (Requires Suit) Current Burst (Area of Effect Explosion)

Electric Gamma Radiation (Thundercrash - Based on "Hulk") Gamma Transformation Thunder Clap Ground Smash Pick Up Entity (DISABLED) Leap

Soul Fire Magic (Hexios - Based on Doctor Strange) Toggle Magic Forcefield Summon Daggers Sculk Boom Soul Energy Bar (Increases with damage) Umbrakinesis (Phantom Knight) Dark Pulse Toggle Shadow Form Shadow Dome Toggle Shadow Blade

Size-Manipulation Suits (Based on The Atom/Ant-Man) (Redstone Mech Mk1) Aim & Fire Laser Grenade Alter Size (Scroll Wheel) Miniaturize Suit (Redstone Mech Mk2) Toggle Suit On/Off Aim & Fire Laser & Fire Beam Redstone Grenade Alter Size (Scroll Wheel) Miniaturize Suit Nanotech Suits

(Rainbow Defender - Based on Iron Man) Defensive Blasts Toggle Shield Toggle Blade

(Iron Prism - Based on Green Arrow + Iron Man) Add / Remove Arrow Toggle Prism Blade Aim and Fire Arrows Cycle Arrows (Scroll Wheel)

Nuclear Fusion (Emberhail - Based on Firestorm/Human Torch) Fire Ball Fire Beam Nuclear Energy Release

Napturgy (Power Nap - Based on REDACTED) REM Beam (Requires REM Suit) Super Strength Take a Power Nap

Power Negation (Deadzone - Based on Cicada) (Requires Dampened Addon) Toggle Dagger Forcefield Charged Jump Toggle Shadow Form Ranged Dampen

Warpwave Manipulation / Breacher (Vibeman - Based on Cisco Ramon's Vibe) Aim & Fire Blast Create Breach Concussive Blast Configure Breach Adjust Intensity

Cosmic Enhancement (Captain Kaisa - Based on Captain Marvel) Binary Mode Cosmic Beam Collision Explosion (while using Sprint Flight)

Asguardian (Sabri's Thor) Stormbreaker Bifrost Teleportation Summon Lightning Slam Orange Lantern Ring Alien Form Mace Construct Energy Shield Energy Shot Greed/Loot-Based Energy Bar

Hyperior (Based on Homelander) Laser Eyes Sonic Scream Ground Slam Chokehold Break Restraints Rage Meter

Witherblade (Based on Daredevil & Wolverine) Witherbone Claws Leap Wall Climbing Regeneration

Circuit (Based on The Winter Soldier) Leap & Crash

Impasse (Based on Gridlock & Juggernaut) Unstoppable Thunder Clap Ground Shake

Steelwing (Based on The Falcon) Glider Wings Jet Boost Gun Holster Cypherius Laser Blast Invisibility Essentium Spear

Proto (Based on The Atom/Ant-Man) Size Change Toggle Blades Levitation Shot

Orange Bat (Based on Batman) Grappling Hook Shock Grenade Blindness Grenade Fragmentation Grenade

Whit ad astra you can craft a rocket ship to fly out into space to explore new planets you will have to craft space armor to survive in outer space

The added elements of tech are designed to leave as many design choices to the player as possible. With Create, the game isn't played inside a bunch of UIs, it challenges you to setup contraptions of animated components working together in many possible arrangements.

Note it can be extreamly lagy it was very lagy when i tested it so just remember that before you instal thos modpack

If you are reading this you are a legend cus i dont think anyone legit reads this much. 

Allso most of you guys is probably only downloading this cus of my Youtube so have fun whit the modpack.
